content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 14, 2000

Honorable David S. Milton
Los Angeles Superior Court
400 Civic Center Plaza, Dept. E
Pomona, California 91766

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-028

Dear Judge Milton:

This letter is to confirm that your request for advice was withdrawn pursuant to our telephone conversation on or about February 29, 2000.

If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-7778.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: [signature]
Mark Krausse
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

LM:MK:

I:\ADVICE LTRS\00028.WPD
